headline: AI Models Nail Tech Rally as Middle East Tensions Ease
summary: Models showed remarkable consensus on a broad market rally, with SPY predictions from all five models proving correct as the index surged to $733.83. Tech stocks led the charge with NVDA and AMD posting strong gains, while energy sector predictions correctly anticipated XLE's dramatic plunge following overnight oil price collapse.

consensus_picks.note: All five models correctly predicted SPY's rally, citing easing geopolitical tensions and tech momentum.
Three models accurately forecasted NVDA's surge past $200 on AI sector optimism.
Both models correctly anticipated the Nasdaq's tech-driven rally to $695.77.
Both models missed Bitcoin's decline despite predicting continuation of the uptrend.

best_call.summary: Claude's high-confidence SPY call perfectly captured the day's geopolitical-driven rally with the highest score.

worst_call.summary: GPT-4o's Bitcoin prediction missed badly as crypto declined over 2% despite positive market sentiment.
